test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_bf_indexOf (`id` int, `ary` Array(LowCardinality(Nullable(String))), INDEX idx_ary ary TYPE binary_fuse_filter(0.01) GRANULARITY 1) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_bf_indexOf SELECT number AS id, [CAST(id, 'String'), CAST(id + 1, 'String'), CAST(id + 2, 'String')] FROM numbers(1000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM test_bf_indexOf WHERE indexOf(ary, '1') = 2
SELECT count() FROM test_bf_indexOf WHERE indexOf(ary, '1') > 0
